## Verification

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./internal/battle/... -count=1` passes (or relevant package)
- [ ] If adding/changing a language key, updated **all 8** files in `internal/language/`
- [ ] If changing game data or mechanics, updated `docs/manual.md`
- [ ] If adding a map or generator, updated `docs/dev.md`
- [ ] VERSION bumped (minor patch, e.g. `0.50.5 → 0.50.6`)
